title: 球打球(Ball2 Battle)
description:
You Control ONE Ball at a Time. Switch Freely — The Rest Fight on Their Own.You control one ball at a time — and you can switch freely between your soldiers anytime. The ones you're not controlling? They fight on their own — with moods, attitudes, and really questionable judgment. Think your bomb ball is chasing the wrong target? Jump into its brain and take over instantly! 🧠

5 Soldier Types. Infinite Chaos.

• 💣 Bomb Ball — Launches homing smiley-face missiles. Because nothing says "war" like a grinning projectile.

• 🪝 Hook Ball — Grapples enemies and drags itself into melee range. Aggressive AND clingy.

• 💚 Helper Ball — Heals the lowest-HP ally. The friend everyone needs but nobody thanks.

• 🔩 Drill Ball — Charges in with a spinning drill. Subtlety is not its strong suit.

• ☠️ Venoms Ball — Fires homing poisoned darts with knockback. Death from afar, delivered with style.

Each soldier has its own Bravery Level, emotional state (Smile → Sad → Berserk), and AI personality. Crank up the aggression and watch them go rogue.

Grab Cards. Build Your Build.Before each round, a card-grabbing machine slides in 10 random buff cards — and your soldiers physically snatch them with a grappling hook!

10 buff types × 5 rarity tiers = insane build variety:

🛡️ Iron (chance to block ALL damage) · 🪶 Lightweight (lower mass, harder to hit) · 🔬 Mini (shrink hitbox) · 💪 Toughness (flat defense boost) · ⚡ Fast Cooldown (attack faster) · 💥 Knockback (send enemies flying) · 🏹 Swift Strike (faster projectiles) · ⚔️ Bigsword (bigger attack range) · 🔥 Diarrhea (recursive combo attacks!) · 👻 Invisibility (vanish and become untargetable)

Same buff stacks! Two Iron cards = higher block chance. Combine freely — or watch the bots grab the good ones first.

2 Game Modes. All Party.⚔️ PVP — 4v4 Team Battle

Best of 7 (first to 4 wins). Pick soldiers, tweak parameters, grab buffs, and fight. Winners pick buffs first next round. Steam or LAN — your call.

🤝 PVE — 5-Stage Co-op

1–4 players vs escalating enemy waves across 5 stages. Beat all 5 to win!

🌍 Daily Global Challenge

Every day, players worldwide face the same enemy lineup on the same map with the same configuration. Finish all 5 stages and your clear time goes straight to the Steam Leaderboard. Compete globally — see how you rank against the world! Top performers earn exclusive rewards and bragging rights. A fresh challenge every single day — no two days are the same.

6 Maps. Random Events. Total Mayhem.Battle across 6 themed arenas — from a pool table with physics-driven balls to a galaxy of stars. Each map has unique interactive elements.

Mid-fight surprises keep everyone on their toes:

💩 Poop — slows victims to a crawl (4x speed reduction, 4 seconds) · 🍌 Banana Peel — uncontrolled sliding for 2 seconds · Events flash before spawning, so you might dodge them. Maybe.

1–8 Players. Any Way You Want.Same screen? 1 device, up to 8 controllers (keyboard splits or gamepads). Different locations? 1–8 devices via Steam or LAN. Want to just watch? Set 0 controllers and let the AI go full auto. Yes, zero is a valid player count.

10 skins per soldier · Funny nickname generator · Post-match roast summaries · Steam Achievements

No "Best Build." Only Your Build.5 opposing parameter axes mean there's no single optimal strategy. Defensive vs offensive, aggressive vs conservative, precision vs special abilities, burst vs consistent, target-weakest vs target-nearest — every choice creates a different kind of chaos.

Ready to lose friends over ball fights? Purchase now. 🎱
description_short: Command one ball at a time — switch freely between soldiers while the rest fight on their own! 5 soldier types, 10 roguelike buffs, and 2 wild modes (PVP / PVE daily global challenges). 1–8 players, local or online. Chaos guaranteed.
